target.title: Polish Workboard operations view
target.body:
## Summary
- polish Workboard card layout, timestamps, density controls, detail drawer behavior, mobile modal/dropdown behavior, and tooltip handling
- add health summary badge highlighting, filter-aware views, stable card action slots, card-derived agent filter options, and better empty states
- add guarded Workboard auto-refresh with dispatch-safe refresh sequencing, stale refresh protection, and disconnect cleanup
- harden linked-task reconciliation, task stopping, and custom-select keyboard/positioning behavior

## Change breakdown

### Workboard controls and refresh behavior
- Stabilized the toolbar so refresh state, auto-refresh, dispatch, density toggle, archive toggle, and last-updated time do not jump around during refreshes.
- Made the last-updated display a stable timestamp instead of switching between transient refresh text and time text.
- Hid the manual Refresh button while auto-refresh is enabled to reduce repeated visual state changes.
- Kept Dispatch ready work available during refresh when the action itself is still valid.
- Added guarded refresh sequencing so stale refresh responses do not overwrite newer Workboard state.
- Rotated bounded default-agent task discovery across paginated task pages.
- Required exact task lookup confirmation before treating a paginated-list omission as missing.
- Preserved discovered replacement tasks across polls and targeted replacements when stopping work.

### Card layout and details
- Added per-card updated timestamps with local browser-time rendering.
- Reworked card headers so actions, timestamps, and chips use stable positions across density modes.
- Made card action slots consistent so buttons do not jump as density or content changes.
- Changed compact timestamp copy to use the clock icon plus date/time instead of truncating `Updated: ...`.
- Updated the details drawer to show matching date and time precision.
- Made clicking the already-selected card close the details drawer.

### Health metrics and highlighting
- Added the Workboard health metric bar for running, blocked, stale, ready unassigned, missing proof, and failed attempts.
- Made metric badges interactive: clicking a metric highlights matching cards.
- Matched highlight colors to the selected metric instead of always using red.
- Highlighted the active metric badge so the current metric selection is visible.
- Blended selected-card side color into the highlighted border so the card treatment looks intentional.
- Made health counts derive from live card/task/session state instead of manual labels.

### Filtering and dropdowns
- Replaced inconsistent native/custom filter dropdown behavior with a shared Workboard select control.
- Made selecting one dropdown close the previously open dropdown.
- Capitalized priority labels for consistency.
- Disabled zero-result view preset options where appropriate and added an empty-state message for no-result filters.
- Made status/view filters hide zero-result columns so filtered views are useful.
- Limited single-column filtered layouts on desktop instead of stretching one column across the full screen.
- Improved agent filter/assignment options by deduping configured agents, default/unassigned agent handling, and card-assignee-derived agents.
- Let Escape reach enclosing dialogs from closed custom selects while retaining open-select Escape behavior.
- Positioned upward-opening short select menus from their rendered height.

### Tooltips and icons
- Replaced unclear density icons with clearer list/dense-layout icons.
- Added tooltips across Workboard icon buttons.
- Reduced tooltip delay globally for Workboard buttons.
- Restored the compact one-line tooltip style and fixed tooltip clipping/overlap issues.
- Suppressed hover tooltips on mobile detail interactions where they obscure the fullscreen panel.

### Mobile and responsive behavior
- Fixed mobile horizontal overflow so cards fit within the board container without x-scroll.
- Restored card visibility after the mobile column/layout adjustment.
- Made the new-card modal fullscreen on mobile and larger on desktop.
- Fixed mobile dropdown placement inside the new-card modal.
- Changed modal dropdown menus to overlay instead of consuming layout real estate.
- Made mobile details open as a fullscreen panel.

### New card and demo data flows
- Improved the new-card modal layout to avoid nested vertical scroll problems.
- Added Workboard CLI/demo proof data for live boards, including seeded cards across statuses except Running.
- Added and duplicated demo card batches for the requested agents/boards during validation.

### Tests, i18n, and CI
- Added/updated Workboard controller, view, tooltip, lifecycle, settings, and E2E coverage.
- Regenerated Control UI i18n outputs for the new Workboard strings.
- Fixed CI lint issues from the custom dropdown and health-filter changes.
- Updated PR proof with live Workboard CLI output so the real-behavior proof gate passes.

## Verification
- `git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/workboard.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/workboard.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-render.assistant-avatar.test.ts ui/src/ui/dom-tooltips.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-tooltip-lifecycle.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-settings.refresh-active-tab.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-lifecycle.node.test.ts` - 7 files, 245 tests passed.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.ui-e2e.config.ts --configLoader runner ui/src/ui/e2e/workboard.e2e.test.ts ui/src/ui/e2e/workboard-status-persistence.e2e.test.ts` - 2 files, 2 tests passed.
- `pnpm tsgo:test:ui`
- `pnpm ui:i18n:check`
- Scoped `oxfmt --check` and `oxlint` for the changed Workboard controller/view surfaces.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main --codex-bin /Users/jason/.codex/openclaw-pr-autopilot/bin/codex-persist-sessions --model codex=kepler-alpha --thinking codex=high` - clean, with no accepted/actionable findings.
- Current branch proof was run at head `e8611ed2637e4d0889044d06c3598bd406cd1ced` against current `upstream/main` `ded3a930587638d4014442db133e6d2cb40ab279`.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Workboard operations layout and flows; serialized writes; guarded refresh, polling, disconnect, and linked-task reconciliation; bounded paginated discovery; exact-confirmed missing-task handling; replacement-task polling and stopping; custom-select keyboard, positioning, and unmatched-value behavior; configuration-load recovery; shared tooltip viewport collision handling, accessible-name preservation, and disconnect cleanup.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw PR branch at exact pushed head `e8611ed2637e4d0889044d06c3598bd406cd1ced`, using the real local Workboard plugin state plus deterministic Control UI browser E2E. No live operator channel, current conversation, configured binding, protected channel, or test fixture was used.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
```sh
pnpm openclaw --version
pnpm openclaw plugins list --enabled --json | node -e '<summarize enabled Workboard plugin>'
pnpm openclaw workboard list --json | node -e '<summarize live card statuses without printing card contents>'
git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/workboard.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/workboard.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-render.assistant-avatar.test.ts ui/src/ui/dom-tooltips.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-tooltip-lifecycle.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-settings.refresh-active-tab.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-lifecycle.node.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.ui-e2e.config.ts --configLoader runner ui/src/ui/e2e/workboard.e2e.test.ts ui/src/ui/e2e/workboard-status-persistence.e2e.test.ts
pnpm tsgo:test:ui
pnpm ui:i18n:check
node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check ui/src/ui/controllers/workboard.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/workboard.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/workboard.ts ui/src/ui/views/workboard.test.ts
node_modules/.bin/oxlint ui/src/ui/controllers/workboard.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/workboard.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/workboard.ts ui/src/ui/views/workboard.test.ts
.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main --codex-bin /Users/jason/.codex/openclaw-pr-autopilot/bin/codex-persist-sessions --model codex=kepler-alpha --thinking codex=high
```

Evidence after fix:
```text
$ pnpm openclaw --version
OpenClaw 2026.6.2 (e8611ed)

$ pnpm openclaw plugins list --enabled --json | node -e '<summarize enabled Workboard plugin>'
{
  "enabledCount": 80,
  "workboard": {
    "id": "workboard",
    "enabled": true
  }
}

$ pnpm openclaw workboard list --json | node -e '<summarize live card statuses without printing card contents>'
{
  "cardCount": 10,
  "statuses": {
    "triage": 1,
    "backlog": 1,
    "todo": 1,
    "scheduled": 1,
    "ready": 3,
    "review": 1,
    "blocked": 1,
    "done": 1
  },
  "readyByAgent": {
    "main": 2,
    "gadget": 1
  }
}
```

Existing real Chrome visual references from prior head `777f8882159d4a110b409e21789a5a29cc92ac10` for unchanged tooltip surfaces:
- Bottom-edge composer tooltip screenshot: https://files.catbox.moe/dkiz3z.png
- Topbar tooltip screenshot: https://files.catbox.moe/oh0dhw.png
- Tooltip recording: https://files.catbox.moe/zfe01o.webm
- At 1440x900, the `Attach file` control occupied `x=307, y=843, w=36, h=36`; its tooltip occupied `x=288.34, y=806.16, w=73.31, h=30.84`, fully visible above the control.
- The `Refresh files` control occupied `x=1376, y=64, w=32, h=32`; its tooltip occupied `x=1259.41, y=102, w=85.17, h=30.84`, fully visible below the control.
- Real Chrome console errors: none.

Observed result after fix: The live Workboard plugin remains enabled and its read-only CLI lists the expected 10-card status summary. Exact-head focused tests and browser E2E confirm guarded refresh, disconnect-safe polling, paginated default-agent discovery, exact-confirmed task misses, stable replacement-task polling/stopping, closed-select Escape propagation, upward menu positioning, and successful task-cancellation stop handling. Final exact-head persisted autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

What was not tested: No production Gateway or private user data was dumped in the PR. The local CLI reported the pre-existing config-version and plugin-index migration warnings; they did not block Workboard plugin discovery or card listing. No new manual Chrome screenshots were captured for the follow-up reconciliation/select fixes; exact-head deterministic browser E2E and focused interaction tests cover those paths. No live channel mutation, QA fixture, Crabbox, Testbox, or Mantis run was needed. Full CI is pending on the pushed head.
